description: JOJO NO KIMYOU NA BOUKEN (1993) Type: OVA Plot Summary: Kujo Jotaro is a normal, popular Japanese high-schooler, until he thinks that he is possessed by a spirit, and locks himself in prison. After seeing his grandfather, Joseph Joestar, and fighting Joseph's friend Muhammad Abdul, Jotaro learns that the "Spirit" is actually Star Platinum, his Stand, or fighting energy given a semi-solid form. Later, his mother gains a Stand, and becomes sick. Jotaro learns that it is because the vampire Dio Brando has been revived 100 years after his defeat to Jonathan Joestar, Jotaro's great-great-grandfather. Jotaro decides to join Joseph and Abdul in a trip to Egypt to defeat Dio once and for all. Genre: Adventure, Drama, Fantasy, Horror, Shounen, Supernatural, Vampire Released: 1993 Status: Completed Other name: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure, JoJo's Bizarre Adventure OVA 1, ジョジョの奇妙な冒険
